xml.narration: Exclusive Seller of Eden Academy Uniforms

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm two millimeters bigger than last time!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sure it's just an error.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: You never know. Kids grow up so quickly.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Indeed.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, with that in mind, we should probably have your uniform made a little bigger.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: But it was quite a shock to hear that you were suddenly married, Yor.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: You should have told me the last time you were here!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm, er, sorry about the other day.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: And to think that your lovely daughter is going to the prestigious Eden College.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Congratulations.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Fank you very much.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Are you an Eden College alum?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, no. I went to an insignificant little school out in the country.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Oh, then do be careful.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: There's something of a wall between parents who are Eden alumni and those who aren't.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Apparently this causes discrimination and bullying among the children, too.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Oh, and hazing from the honor students,

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: and conflict between the dorm kids and commuters.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Speaking of, I hear that kidnappings of commuter kids are on the rise.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: It's not surprising, considering most of the kids who can attend Eden are rich.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't wanna go to school anymore.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Oh, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to scare you.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Don't worry. There are plenty of fun things about it, too.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Okay, all done with your measurements.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Let's see, you'll be getting one uniform,

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: plus a winter coat, a vest, and a sweater, for three additional items.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: You're a regular here, so I'll get those done immediately.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Oh, you'll be able to get everything else you need from the shop on the corner.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is going to cost more than I thought.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What's the matter?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I am in fear that I will be kidnapped.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, I see. You sure didn't waste any time.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor, is it all right if we eat out today?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, of course.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Are there any kidnappers at the restaurant?

dialogue.name: Waiter
dialogue.speech: Here's our special for the day.

dialogue.name: Waiter
dialogue.speech: Pork sauté in pawpaw sauce with porcini mushrooms and potato potage.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Po?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Looks delicious.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Must be cipher P.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ah, a notice about my briefing.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It'll be in five days at hours at safe house D.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Understood.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But I really need to ask them to stop using this notification method.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's something unpleasant about it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hello?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, yes, hi.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What? It's done already?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: All right. We'll come pick up the order today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Is the uniform done?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sounds like it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But I have my briefing today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry to trouble you, Yor,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but could you go pick it up with Anya for me?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I got called into work.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Of course. You can count on me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I might not get home until late, so you can go ahead and get delivery for dinner.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Have a knees day.

dialogue.name: WISE HandlerSylvia Sherwood Alias
dialogue.speech: Handler

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Good day... or perhaps good evening, Agent Twilight.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hello, Handler. What's this about?

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Before we get into that...

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: What in the world were all those expenses the other day?!

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: A castle rental fee, and rental fees for furniture to go in said castle?!

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: You think we're made of money?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, here's a couple more bills, actually.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Going to school is apparently very expensive.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: I have to admire the ba*ls it takes to just casually hand me more bills.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, they're all necessary expenses.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Very well. Anyway...

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: I'm here today to brief you on phase of Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Though you're usually on the ball, so that may not be necessary.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well... I may actually be off my game lately.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Phase requires a social gathering.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Before we get into the details, let's review how Eden works.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Eden College.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: There are around , students

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: ranging from the ages of six to nineteen, and the curriculum covers all thirteen years.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Academics, sports, the arts...

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: They offer a top-class education in every field.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: The students who manage to shine brighter than their fellow elites

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: are the honor students known as the Imperial Scholars.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: The social gathering that Desmond attends

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: is only open to those Imperial Scholars and their parents.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: In order to become an Imperial Scholar,

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: a student must earn eight merits known as "Stella."

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Stella Stars are awarded for exceptional grades and contributions to society.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Which means, first, you need to raise your daughter into an honor student.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: You may use underhanded means if necessary.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: On the other hand,

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: poor grades and bad behavior will result in demerits called Tonitrus Bolts.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: When a student receives eight of those, they will be immediately expelled,

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: so be aware of that.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Now, let's work out the finer details.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Turning that child into a honor student...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hello, anxiety, my old friend.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Do I look cute in my uniform?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, you look absolutely adorable!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Let's go to the portrait studio later!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ta-da!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Do I look cute?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, you look absolutely adorable!

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Could you leave already? How many times are you gonna say that?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna go on an ooting in this!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, let's do that!

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Thanks much.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Doot, do! Doot, do! Doot, do!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Why don't we stop by the park?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is my uniform. Ta-da!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I am wearing my uniform. Ta-da!

dialogue.name: Mother A
dialogue.speech: My, your daughter's adorable.

dialogue.name: Mother B
dialogue.speech: She goes to Eden? I'm so jealous.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh... Hello.

dialogue.name: Mother B's child
dialogue.speech: Mom, I'm hungry.

dialogue.name: Mother A
dialogue.speech: And what would you like for dinner?

dialogue.name: Mother A's child
dialogue.speech: Hamburg steak!

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: So you do prefer your old mother.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want to be with them forever.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I know that we're just a pretend family.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Maybe I could be more of a mother to her.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I just showed everyone how cute I am!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Make sure you don't dirty your uniform before you go to school.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Say, Miss Anya. Why don't we stop by the supermarket on our way home?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid said he was going to be home late, so I'll make dinner tonight.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ooh!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Can you cook, Mama?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes. I will do my very best.

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: Hey, is that kid from Eden?

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: Is the chick next to her the mom?

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: She's gotta be the hired help.

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: No rich person's gonna go shopping themselves.

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: You know, I think I want an allowance.

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: Me, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sure I'll be able to make something if I have some meat and vegetables.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm not sure what any of these are,so I'll just buy all of them.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ta-da!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm going outside now. I'm bored.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, don't wander off too far!

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: Hello there, little lady.

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: Be a good girl for just a little bit.

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: Once your maid pays up, we'll let you go.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Bad guys!

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Eden has bullying and kidnappings...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: She was right!

dialogue.name: Thug C
dialogue.speech: I heard you can even sell their uniforms for a sweet price.

dialogue.name: Thug B
dialogue.speech: Excellent. In that case, little lady, let's take your—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What do you think you're doing?

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: Uh-oh! Looks like we're gonna have to tack on some medical bills, too.

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: Let's see your wallet, Miss Hired Help.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm afraid I used up all of my cash, so I have none left.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So I must ask you to leave.

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: I see. Then I guess we're just gonna have to strip the little lady.

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: You're gonna be fired anyway,

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: so go back to the countryside, you shitty little maid!

dialogue.name: Thug A
dialogue.speech: Sh-She destroyed that pumpkin with her bare hand?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I am that girl's mother!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If you do not want to end up like that vegetable, leave at once!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry. I shouldn't have let you out of my sight.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: There, there...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: And I've ruined all of the ingredients...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm such a failure as a mother.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But I love that my Mama is so strong and cool.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: There, there.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: k*ller punch, kapow!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I'm so embarrassed!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Train me, please!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: T-Train you?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I know it's really dangerous to be an Eden student now.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But it won't be as scary if I train!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I can do my best at school without dying!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna be like you, Mama!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Even if I can't be like a normal mother,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm going to do everything I can for her.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right. Let's go straight home and start your training.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Training!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm home...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hah! Hah!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What are you doing?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Preparing her to go to school!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Hah!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hah!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yeah... I'm filled with nothing but anxiety.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Hah!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hah!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Hah!

dialogue.name: Headmaster
dialogue.speech: You are truly the chosen.

dialogue.name: Headmaster
dialogue.speech: Due to your hard work, or perhaps your parents,

dialogue.name: Headmaster
dialogue.speech: you have made it to the hallowed halls of Eden.

dialogue.name: Headmaster
dialogue.speech: To our honorable new students...

dialogue.name: Headmaster
dialogue.speech: Congratulations, and welcome to our school.

dialogue.name: Headmaster
dialogue.speech: Everyone here at Eden welcomes you from the bottom of our hearts.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We finally made it this far...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, a lot of people are wearing the same thing I am.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes. That's what a uniform is.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I still have a mountain of problems to tackle, but...

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Listen up, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: There are requirements to attend Desmond's social gathering.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: The student must be an Imperial Scholar.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: And for that to happen, they must receive plenty of merits.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Do not forget that the future of the East and West depends on this mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Turning this child into an elite...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've mostly given up on that task.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Shock!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This school is already filled with the best of the best.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It'll be difficult to maintain a top position.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: More importantly...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Next, we will announce the houses and their housemasters.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Please come forward when your name is called.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Class one: Specter Hall.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: William Howard.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Theodore Russell.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Grace Fein.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Jessica Clark.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Next, we have class two: Cline Hall.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wonder what class I'm gonna be in.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Who knows?

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Lucy Garrett.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Actually... I do.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Because I changed parts of the lineups to help with my mission.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Class three: Cecile Hall.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Alice Paulette.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To ensure that Anya...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Edward Perkshire.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Damian Desmond.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: would be in the same class as him.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The second son of my target, Donovan Desmond...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Damian.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That's Lord Damian to you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He got into Eden just like his older brother.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've had my eye on him ever since I saw his name on the list of students applying.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Jesse Capel.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If plan A to get Anya to become an Imperial Scholar proves too difficult,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: we'll go to plan B.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I call it... the Friendship Scheme.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Step one: be in the same class as him and become friends.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Step two: be invited to his house and bring me along.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Step three: direct contact with the target!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sure it won't actually go that easily,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but the more insurance we have, the better.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Anya Forger.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Go ahead.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya must have grown up around kids her age at the orphanage for years.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll put my faith in her communication skills.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: That's the evil boss's kid.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: What's with her?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Heh, I see.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: She's already realized how amazing I am and fallen for me.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: You've got good taste, kid.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Playing hard to get, I see. Cute.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Becky Blackbell.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Geh...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Pleasure to meet you!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The daughter of the CEO of the major military contractor, Blackbell.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What?! And behind her is the daughter of the vice president of parliament!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And among the boys, there's the son of one of the key members of the secret service!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Her classmates are a treasure trove of intel!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Make sure you become friends with all of them, Anya!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid gets so worked up when it comes to his daughter.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'm Becky! What's your name?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: She looks like a baby. I guess I wouldn't mind taking care of her a bit.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Hmph.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Those will be the students in class three.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Hey!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hello?!

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: And you will be under the tutelage of Master Henderson.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, it's the nice teacher.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So he didn't get fired after all.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I feel it's unfair for a housemaster to have to teach new students,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but I guess it could've been much worse.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I'll just have to whip these rugrats into shape like I used to.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: And now, the new students will accompany their homeroom teachers on a tour of the campus,

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: then head to their respective classrooms.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: During that time, there will be a meet and greet in Tower C's lounge for the guardians.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Do your best, Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You'll be on your own from here on out.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Okey-dokey!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: You there! Stay in line!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm so worried...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It is always nerve-racking to send them off into the world.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I totally understand.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: This is the dining hall.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: The best chefs will present you with the most elegant dishes daily.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Beyond those doors is a special dining hall reserved only for Imperial Scholars.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Anyone can become an Imperial Scholar if they achieve elegant grades and earn eight Stella.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I trust that you will all do your best.

dialogue.name: Children
dialogue.speech: Yes, sir!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: However, those who fall behind

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: will receive Tonitrus Bolts and face punishment or expulsion, so stay on your toes.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Why are you looking at me?

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Lord Damian's gonna be an Imperial Scholar in no time!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Of course I am.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: We'd expect nothing else!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I mean, my father is the head of the National Unity Party.

dialogue.name: Student A
dialogue.speech: Wait, really?!

dialogue.name: Student B
dialogue.speech: Wow!

dialogue.name: Student C
dialogue.speech: My Papa says we owe a lot to the Desmond Group!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Silence! No private conversations!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: They're so dumb.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: What about you? What does your father do?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: If he's important enough, I'd consider letting you be my friend, too.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I will stay calm for the mission.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He's a sp—a feelings doctor.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Hmph. So he's just a nobody.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: You're probably not that rich, either. Lame.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna go play at your house.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: You moron! Know your place, uggo!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: This is the problem with measly little peasants.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: You're gonna get your gross peasant germs on him! Scram!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Now is the time for me tounleash my k*ller punch!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Listen carefully, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Gasp!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Anyone who lets their emotions control their fists

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: does not know the meaning of true strength.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If someone's just being a little mean,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: being able to laugh it off makes you the cooler, bigger girl.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A big girl!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: And if you can keep a smile on your face, fights will not happen.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Hey, stop being so pathetic. At least say something back.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Heh. Like I care.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Heh.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: H-How dare she smirk at me like she's mocking me?!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Look at that composure! She's so mature! Amazing!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I was wrong about her being a baby!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You're way more grown-up than I thought. I'm impressed.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm a grown-up?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Heh.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Don't get c*ck, you stupid uggo!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Uggo, uggo, Queen Uggo!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Lord Damian, perhaps you should broaden your vocabulary...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What's your problem?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Sure, she's uglier than me, but you don't have to be so mean.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Shut your mouth!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: You there! How many times must I warn you?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Do you want punishments on your first day?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Curse you... How dare you embarrass me like that?!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: You'll pay for this!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama, you liar. Smiling didn't help at all.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: If you don't quit it, I'm gonna tell the teacher!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: What? You have proof that we did it?

dialogue.name: Ewen and Emile
dialogue.speech: Yeah, yeah!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Go on. Move!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Hey, you smug uggo!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna bully you every single day!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna teach you a lesson so you'll never be able to smirk again!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Her feelings doctor father might be able to fix her if she cries.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Seriously? Well, that's impressive!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Aren't you a special widdle girl?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Hey, where do you think you're looking? You scared?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: What is the meaning of this?!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Sir! She just punched Lord Damian!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I just reached out my hand ,and somehow, he ran into it.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: You liar! You're not fooling anyone!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: You were even making sure the teacher wasn't looking earlier!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: You got any proof I did it?

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: You left the imprint of your fist on his face!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I trust you are aware that perjury is a disgraceful act,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Anya Forger.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: That's not what happened, sir!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: She was holding back all day, but these bullies just...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: So it's true that she hit him?

dialogue.name: flashback Yor
dialogue.speech: Listen carefully, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Gasp!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: The only time it's all right for you to use force is, for example,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: if you're saving a friend in trouble.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: H-Her foot...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He stepped on it.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So I got mad...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: She did that for me?!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Oh, Anya!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: She held back her own personal anger,

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Thank you! Thank you, Anya!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: and had the courage to stand up to a lad for her friend.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'm so moved!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Truly elegant, Anya Forger.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: But I'm afraid...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So the Desmonds didn't appear after all.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, there's no need to rush.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now that she's enrolled, we have all the time in the world.

dialogue.name: Staff
dialogue.speech: Ladies and gentlemen.

dialogue.name: Staff
dialogue.speech: The students' orientation is now complete, so please head toward the courtyard.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And I was able to make some connections.

dialogue.name: Staff
dialogue.speech: If you would gather round, we will take a group photo.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Where's Anya?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Forger.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Come with me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She punched a boy?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you hurt at all?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And it just happened to be Desmond's son?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Usually, acts of violence would immediately mean three Tonitrus Bolts...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What in the world?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: But at my discretion, it became one.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That is as much as I can do.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm terribly sorry, Loid! All because I trained her...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I will speak with his parents, too.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's the first day of school and she lost a point.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To top it off, her relationship with Damian couldn't be any worse.

dialogue.name: Photographer
dialogue.speech: All right, everyone! We're taking the picture!

dialogue.name: Photographer
dialogue.speech: The family on the right over there! Smile a little more!

dialogue.name: Photographer
dialogue.speech: Say, "Cheese!"

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Stella needed to become an Imperial Scholar: Tonitrus Bolts until expulsion: Relationship with Damian: -

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: THE TARGET'S SECOND SON
